text: "Hey, how are you doing?" "I'm doing okay." "It's Caroline calling from Wellness Direct. Thanks for picking up." "Actually, there's a painless glucose monitor that tracks your sugar all day, no fingerprints."

"Actually, there's a painless glucose monitor that tracks your sugar all day, no fingerprints."
